name: Quick Fruit Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 12-3/8 ounces reduced fat refrigerated cinnamon rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch square pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, combine strawberries, sugar, cornstarch, lemon juice, and salt. Stir constantly until thickened.
4. Pour mixture into prepared pan. Arrange cinnamon rolls in one layer over strawberry mixture; reserve icing from package.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown. Spread icing evenly over top.
